variant: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

request.message: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

response_body.response: don't see a week-by-week minoxidil timeline in your current docs. the evidence says results take several months of consistency, but there's no staged breakdown. here's what i can tell you from the protocol: minoxidil improves blood flow to follicles, stimulates growth, increases thickness, and slows loss. topical (liquid/foam) or oral (low-dose rx) are the two forms. if you're stacking it with microneedling, that increases absorption and synergistic effect. consistency over 8 weeks matters more than a week-by-week map, since hair cycles don't reset on a calendar. if you want me to pull a general minoxidil timeline from standard protocols (shedding phase, early regrowth, density gains), i can do that. let me know.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
